list.selfOnboardingWarningLabel: Self-onboarding employees can change your company tax requirements
list.selfOnboardingWarningDescription: If your employees are self-onboarding and enter details that change your company's state tax requirements (such as a home address in a new state), you may need to complete state tax setup again.
list.emptyTableDescription: Add company location or an employee to get started.

manageRates.title: Tax rates for {{state}}
manageRates.subtitle: Effective-dated tax rate history and scheduled future rates.
manageRates.emptyHistoryDescription: Add a tax rate to schedule a future-dated configuration.
manageRates.addRateDialogDescription: Schedule a new tax configuration to take effect on a future date.
manageRates.noEditableFieldsDescription: This state does not expose editable effective-dated tax requirements.
